name: qianniu-promotion-center-cost-crawler

evidence.summary: TaobaoPromotionCrawler reads the Qianniu promotion center page through BrowserService CDP, extracts only the cost metric, returns one promotion center item, and returns null cost values on failures.
BrowserService checks CDP availability, opens the promotion center URL in an existing Qianniu PC CDP session, captures body text after scrolling, and classifies login or permission failures.

Covers cost-only extraction, no channel split, no exposure/click/conversion capture, access failure classification, scheduler promotion snapshot write, monitor snapshot cost propagation, and no-zero failure semantics.

evidence.command: python -m pytest -q -p no:cacheprovider --basetemp .\.pytest-tmp\T06-current tests\test_taobao_promotion_crawler.py tests\test_storage_and_scheduler.py tests\test_metric_scheduler_delta.py
PowerShell environment variable presence probe plus Invoke-WebRequest http://127.0.0.1:9222/json/version
evidence.summary: Required Feishu credentials/table ids and a reachable Qianniu CDP session were not available.

blockers.summary: FEISHU_APP_ID, FEISHU_APP_SECRET, FEISHU_APP_TOKEN, FEISHU_WEBHOOK, FEISHU_TABLE_PROMOTION_SNAPSHOT, FEISHU_TABLE_MONITOR_SNAPSHOT, FEISHU_TABLE_METRICS_10MIN, and FEISHU_TABLE_TASK_LOG were absent, so live Feishu write/upsert/readback proof could not be attempted.
QIANNIU_CDP_URL was absent and the default http://127.0.0.1:9222/json/version endpoint was unreachable, so live Qianniu PC promotion-center collection could not be attempted.

limitations.summary: Local tests verify crawler parsing, scheduler/storage behavior, and no-zero failure semantics. They do not prove live Qianniu or live Feishu acceptance.
Missing TAOBAO_APP_KEY, TAOBAO_APP_SECRET, and TAOBAO_SESSION_KEY do not block the current crawler-first T06 scope.

next_actions: Provide a logged-in Qianniu PC client with CDP enabled, or set QIANNIU_CDP_URL to a reachable existing CDP endpoint, then rerun only T06 live promotion-center verification.
Provide Feishu app credentials, webhook, app token, and the required table ids through environment variables, then rerun only T06 live write/upsert/readback verification.
